name: Jack-o'-Lantern Cookies
recipeIngredient: 7 Small Green Gumdrops, Cut In Half
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small saucepan, combine frosting and candy coating; melt over low heat, stirring occasionally until smooth. Remove from heat. Stir in desired amount of food coloring.
2. Line cookie sheets with waxed paper. Using tongs, dip each cookie into the melted frosting mixture, coating completely. Lay flat on cookie sheets. Let stand 10 minutes until set.
3. Decorate coated cookies with jack-o'-lantern faces using decorator icing. Top each with one gumdrop half for stem.
